assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration shows maintenance_policy with recurring_window set to Saturday 2 AM UTC with FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA recurrence

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The response uses Terraform configuration but does not provide the specific gcloud commands with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration includes quarterly_freezes with Q1, Q2, Q3, and Q4 freeze periods, each spanning approximately 10-16 days within the 30-day limit

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: The quarterly_freezes local includes an annual audit period from November 1st to November 30th with scope NO_UPGRADES

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or explain how to handle longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and automatic upgrades regarding maintenance window compliance

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GKE release channels (Stable or Extended) or recommend using them for additional upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The shell script includes gcloud container clusters update commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end flags

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on Kubernetes versions during extended exclusion periods
